source: Florida DBPR, Division of Hotels & Restaurants — public inspection extracts (Districts 1 & 2)
filter: Violations citing ceilings, ceiling tiles, walls, vents, exhaust hoods, ductwork, grease, or HVAC (DBPR codes 36-xx / 51-xx)
